description_long: This object is a straight-edged sword with a long, narrow blade that tapers to a sharp point. The blade appears to be made of dark metal, featuring a subtle pattern or texture along its length, possibly indicating some decorative etching or forging marks. The crossguard is ornate, with curled ends and a slightly flared design, providing both protection and a decorative touch. The handle is cylindrical and appears to be wrapped or textured for grip, ending in a rounded pommel. The overall design suggests a blend of functionality and aesthetics, suitable for ceremonial or display purposes as well as practical use. The color palette is primarily dark, with metallic and possibly bronze or brass accents on the guard and handle.
description: A straight, dark metal sword with an ornate crossguard and a textured handle, featuring subtle decorative patterns along the blade.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the straight blade, ornate crossguard, and cylindrical handle.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the blade and handle, with minimal visible detail.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the blade, crossguard, and handle from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile of the sword with little surface detail visible.
attribute_handle_design: cylindrical, textured or wrapped, rounded pommel, dark coloration
